meta.title: The magic of LoRA!
meta.description:
LoRA or Low Rank Adaption is a fine-tuning method that saves on compute and memory while delivering better results.

This is a new video format - so let me know in the comments if you like it and want more explainers!

0:00 Explaining LoRA
0:15 Representing a large matrix as two compact matrices
1:10 How LoRA works for fine-tuning
1:25 Initiating matrix values for LoRA
2:00 Choosing the rank size, r
2:25 LoRA can be better than full matrix training!
2:40 LoRA suggests LLMs could be more compact
3:55 The benefits of LoRA
